---
title: "Descriptive statistics"
format: html
---

```{r}
source("R/data_setup.R")
```

## Demographics

```{r}
knitr::kable(gender_summary, caption = "Gender distribution")
```

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(city_summary, 15), caption = "Top 15 cities")
```

## `quest`-grouped descriptives

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
  DT::datatable(
    descriptive_msd_by_quest,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
  )
} else {
  knitr::kable(descriptive_msd_by_quest, caption = "Install package `DT` for table display")
}
```
*Note. `gm` = gross motor, `fm` = fine motor, `cg` = problem-solving, `ps` = personal-social, and `c` = communication.*

## Selected analysis columns preview

```{r}
preview_cols <- c("quest", "age", "birth_date", "gender", "city", "c1", "gm1", "fm1", "cg1", "ps1", "c_sum", "gm_sum", "fm_sum", "cg_sum", "ps_sum")
preview_df <- selected_data %>% select(any_of(preview_cols))

if (requireNamespace("DT", quietly = TRUE)) {
  DT::datatable(
    preview_df,
    rownames = FALSE,
    options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, dom = "tip")
  )
} else {
  knitr::kable(head(preview_df, 25), caption = "Install package `DT` for table filters")
}
```
*Note. `gm` = gross motor, `fm` = fine motor, `cg` = problem-solving, `ps` = personal-social, and `c` = communication.*
